title: Atlas Finds the Rainbow
synopsis: Baby Atlas discovers colorful objects hiding around his diverse neighborhood playground through an engaging peek-a-boo adventure that teaches colors and delights with repetitive, soothing patterns.

illustration.description: Atlas, a smiling Black toddler with short curly hair wearing a soft yellow shirt, sits on green grass looking around curiously with big bright eyes. His hands are positioned as if searching for something. The background shows a sunny playground with soft pastel colors and rounded playground equipment in the distance.
illustration.alt: Atlas sitting on grass looking around curiously

illustration.description: A bright red ball bounces in front of Atlas who claps his hands with delight, his face showing pure joy. Behind them, a diverse group of children play - including a girl with braids and a boy with light brown skin. The red ball is prominently featured with motion lines showing its bouncing movement.
illustration.alt: Atlas clapping as a red ball bounces nearby

illustration.description: Atlas covers his eyes with his small hands in a classic peek-a-boo pose, giggling. The scene shows him standing near a sandbox where other toddlers are playing. Soft blue sky fills the background with puffy white clouds, creating a peaceful, warm atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Atlas playing peek-a-boo with hands over eyes

illustration.description: A beautiful blue bird perches on Atlas's outstretched finger as he gazes at it with wonder. His mouth forms a small 'o' of amazement. In the background, a Asian grandmother sits on a bench reading to a small child, creating a multi-generational scene of warmth and community.
illustration.alt: Blue bird perched on Atlas's finger

illustration.description: Atlas points upward with one chubby finger, his face tilted toward the sky with an expression of discovery. He stands in a garden area where a Latina mother pushes her baby in a swing nearby. Soft green leaves and colorful flowers frame the scene in gentle watercolor tones.
illustration.alt: Atlas pointing upward looking for yellow

illustration.description: Atlas spreads his arms wide with the biggest smile, basking in golden sunlight that creates a gentle glow around him. The yellow sun beams down warmly, and sunbeams are illustrated as soft golden rays. Other children of various ethnicities play happily in the background, all enjoying the warm sunshine.
illustration.alt: Atlas with arms spread wide in warm sunshine

illustration.description: Atlas crouches down low, peering under some playground equipment with curious eyes. His posture shows him actively searching and exploring. A Middle Eastern father sits nearby with his toddler, both watching Atlas's playful investigation with amused expressions.
illustration.alt: Atlas crouching and looking under playground equipment

illustration.description: Atlas sits in lush green grass, pulling his knees up as he laughs with pure delight. His face shows uncontainable joy as he feels the grass with his hands. Around him, diverse families enjoy picnics on colorful blankets, creating a scene of community happiness and togetherness.
illustration.alt: Atlas giggling while sitting in green grass

illustration.description: Atlas stands in the center with arms raised in celebration, surrounded by all the colorful objects from his adventure - the red ball, blue bird, yellow sun, and green grass. The diverse community of children and families from previous pages gather around him, all smiling and celebrating together in a joyful rainbow of colors.
illustration.alt: Atlas celebrating surrounded by colorful objects and diverse friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is the ball that bounces?
questions.explanation: The red ball bounces and goes 'boing, boing!'

questions.question: What does the blue bird do?
How does Atlas feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Atlas is happy when he finds all the colors!
